ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set, allows to travel using forward-links. If you have a graph like this: A -> B -> C and you ask about the story between A and C, it will give you 'A, B, C' since A forward-links to B and B forward-links to C
ast.target: 如果设置，将允许使用正向链接进行导航。如果您有一个这样的图：A -> B -> C，并且您询问 A 和 C 之间的故事，它会给出 'A, B, C'，因为 A 正向链接到 B，B 正向链接到 C。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set, allows to travel using back-links. If you have a graph like this: A -> B -> C and you ask about the story between C and A, it will give you 'C, B, A' since C has a back-link from B and B has a back-link from A
ast.target: 如果设置，将允许使用反向链接进行导航。如果您有一个这样的图：A -> B -> C，并且您询问 C 和 A 之间的故事，它会给出 'C, B, A'，因为 C 有来自 B 的反向链接，B 有来自 A 的反向链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set, allows to travel using tags.
ast.target: 如果设置，将允许使用标签进行导航。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set, will skip 'hub' notes with too many links (MOCs). Configure exactly how many links make a MOC below.
ast.target: 如果设置，将跳过链接过多的“枢纽”笔记（MOC）。请在下方配置具体多少个链接构成一个 MOC。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Configure at which point to skip a note because it contains too many out-bound links. Applies only if 'Take the scenic route' above is set.
ast.target: 配置在笔记包含过多出站链接时跳过该笔记的阈值。仅当上方设置了“选择风景路线”时适用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set, will note include notes from the specified folders in your search. Please use comma to deliminate several folders
ast.target: 如果设置，将在搜索中包含指定文件夹中的笔记。请使用逗号分隔多个文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set, will turn titles in the list into links to their respective note
ast.target: 如果设置，将把列表中的标题转换为指向其各自笔记的链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set, will automatically create transcluding links for you ('![[note]]' instead of '- [[note]]')
ast.target: 如果设置，将自动为您创建嵌入链接（'![[note]]' 而不是 '- [[note]]'）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set, will increase the contrast to make the result-list easier to read.
ast.target: 如果设置，将增加对比度以使结果列表更易于阅读。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: How many links make a MOC?
ast.target: 多少个链接构成一个 MOC？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Find the Story Between Two Notes
ast.target: 查找两条笔记之间的故事

ast.name: text
ast.source: Here are some possible reasons why:
ast.target: 以下是一些可能的原因：

ast.name: text
ast.source: You currently have forward-links disabled in your settings
ast.target: 您当前在设置中禁用了正向链接

ast.name: text
ast.source: You currently have back-links disabled in your settings
ast.target: 您当前在设置中禁用了反向链接

ast.name: text
ast.source: You currently have tags disabled in your settings
ast.target: 您当前在设置中禁用了标签

ast.name: text
ast.source: You currently have skipping folders enabled
ast.target: 您当前启用了跳过文件夹

ast.name: text
ast.source: The two notes may not be in the same network.
ast.target: 这两条笔记可能不在同一个网络中。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Avoid traveling via certain notes and folders
ast.target: 避免通过某些笔记和文件夹进行导航
